title: Losses to Be Expected
overview: Looks at two communities on either side of the Czech-Austrian border. There's an elderly man in Austria looking for a new wife, and he meets a lone single woman on the Czech side of the border.

trailers.title: Mit Verlust ist zu rechnen - Ulrich Seidl
